lex.bot.multiplevaluessetting.CfnAbout: Indicates whether a slot can return multiple values.

lex.bot.multiplevaluessetting.AllowMulti.Description: Indicates whether a slot can return multiple values. When `true`, the slot may return more than one value in a response. When `false`, the slot returns only a single value.  Multi-value slots are only available in the en-US locale. If you set this value to `true` in any other locale, Amazon Lex throws a `ValidationException`.  If the `allowMutlipleValues` is not set, the default value is `false`.
